title: Scholarship opportunities for students - Scholarships360

images.alt: “College Here I Come” Essay Scholarship for High School Seniors

desc: Scholarships360 is a scholarships website dedicated to finding great scholarship opportunities for students and providing financial aid advice.
text:
Sign in Sign up
Top Scholarships Matched to Your Profile
Vetted scholarships for high school, college, and graduate students. Access exclusive scholarships only available to Scholarships360 members.
Sign up
100% free. No spam.
BECOME A SCHOLARSHIPS360 MEMBER
A better way to find and win scholarships
Scholarships360 uses data-driven matching and expert advice
to help you pay for college.
Personalized scholarship matching
Complete our scholarship matching quiz to receive personalized scholarships in your inbox each week.
Vetted scholarships, never expired
Unlike other scholarship websites, we have a team of research experts that ensure that scholarships are vetted and not expired.
Expert advice
From FAFSA to student loan repayment, our content experts are here to help you navigate every step of the admissions and financial aid process.
No ads and no spam
We hate spam and display advertising and don’t want to distract you as you apply to college and secure financial aid.
Apply to Scholarships
LEADING COLLEGES AND UNIVERSITIES RECOMMEND SCHOLARSHIPS360
Exclusive Scholarships
Exclusive scholarship opportunities for students that are only available to students in the Scholarships360 community!
Application due 01/31/2023
“College Here I Come” Essay Scholarship for High School Seniors
Open to all high school seniors
Apply
Application due 01/31/2023
“Outstanding Undergraduate” Essay Scholarship
Open to U.S. citizens and permanent residents currently attending four-year universities in the U.S.
Apply
Application due 01/31/2023
“Gutsy Graduate Student” Essay Scholarship
Open to incoming or current graduate students, including those seeking master’s, doctorates, and graduate certificates
Apply

TRUSTED SINCE 2010, UPDATED DAILY
Why Scholarships360?
With decades of experience as scholarship and financial aid advisers, admissions professionals, and students, the Scholarships360 team is building with you in mind.
Learn more about our team and mission
We’re a mission-driven organization
Scholarships360 was founded by two first-generation college students who understand the pains of paying for college.
We vet all scholarships on the site
All scholarships are reviewed by a trained research staff, and all content is approved by our team of experts. Read more about our Educational Review Board here.
We treat your data like it's our own
Data integrity and security is extremely important to us! We’ll never spam you and can you learn more about our privacy policy here.
We’re members of leading educational communities
We’re proud members of the National Scholarship Providers Association and National College Attainment Network.
